    Classes in com.semanticprivacyguard.model that implement interfaces with type arguments of type PIIMatch
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    PIIMatch
    Represents a single detected occurrence of PII within the original text.
    Methods in com.semanticprivacyguard.model that return types with arguments of type PIIMatch
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PIIMatch>
    RedactionResult.getMatches()
    Returns an unmodifiable list of all PII matches, sorted by position.
    Methods in com.semanticprivacyguard.model with parameters of type PIIMatch
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    PIIMatch.compareTo(PIIMatch other)
    Orders matches by their start position, then by end position descending (longest match first for the same start).
    boolean
    PIIMatch.overlaps(PIIMatch other)
    Returns true if this match overlaps with other.

    Description
